task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web console.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert profile is named correctly with the specified description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the alert creation/configuration screen, the 'Profile Name' field contains exactly 'SWIFT Terminal Access' and the 'Description' field contains 'Monitor all logons to the SWIFT payment terminal'.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert severity and category are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The severity dropdown/radio button is set to 'High' or 'Critical', and the category is set to 'Logon Audit' (or 'User Logon').

task_completion.description: Verify the alert is configured to trigger on 'Success' events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event trigger criteria or event status filter is explicitly set to 'Success'.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert condition targets the specific SWIFT terminal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rule or filter condition is visible showing 'Client Machine Name' (or 'Workstation Name') 'contains' (or equals) 'SWIFT-TERM-01'.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert profile is saved and marked as active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created 'SWIFT Terminal Access' alert appears in the list of configured alerts and its status toggle/icon indicates it is active or enabled.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to configure the alert.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the web browser and the ADAudit Plus web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must clearly be the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web console, not a text editor, notes app, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the configuration into the correct application form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required strings (like 'SWIFT Terminal Access' and 'SWIFT-TERM-01') must be entered into the specific input fields of the alert creation form, rather than just pasted arbitrarily on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Alert Name: 'SWIFT Terminal Access'. Description: 'Monitor all logons to the SWIFT payment terminal'. Target Machine: 'SWIFT-TERM-01'. Severity: 'High' or 'Critical'. Category: 'Logon Audit' or 'User Logon'. Trigger: 'Success' events.
